meaning: n.苏醒,复兴,复活,再生效,复苏
examples: There are encouraging signs of an artistic revival.
This return to realism has produced a revival of interest in a number of artists.
The most surprising bout of consolidation and revival has been in Latin America.
The article 'The LA food truck revival' was published in partnership with Lonely Planet.
Billy Graham's last television interview while producing a documentary on his last revival in New York.
